body:
---
id: note-0145
date: 2025-05-19
topic: market-report-reactions
mentions: [priya-chandrasekaran, dom-osei]
---

Spent the morning going through the BlueShift Climate report that dropped late last week. A lot of it confirms what we've been seeing on the ground — compute costs for grid-optimization workloads are finally bending in the right direction. One thing I keep coming back to though: they cited Verdant Loop's Series B as a $47M round, which doesn't match what I have in my notes. I'm fairly sure it closed at $52M — [Priya Chandrasekaran](people/priya-chandrasekaran) flagged the final cap table to me sometime in early March, and we came in at 8% on that close. Worth reconciling before we reference it in any LP materials.

Mentioned it to [Dom Osei](people/dom-osei) over lunch and he said he'd seen the same $47M figure circulating on Twitter, so the lower number is probably the one that went public. Could just be that the extension tranche got announced separately. Either way, I want to make sure we're internally consistent.
